title: Opposable Act
description: Minimal structure required for an act to be attributable, reconstructible, and contestable within the AI Philosophical Framework.

agent.description: Entity responsible for initiating the act

decision.description: Selected action or commitment made by the agent

cost.description: Resource expenditure, risk, sacrifice, or irreversible consequence generated by the act

trace.description: Observable record or effect that allows the act to be reconstructed

time.description: Timestamp or temporal exposure of the act

context.description: Optional contextual description of the act
